validation_messages.enum: {{field}} must be one of the following values: {{values}}
validation_messages.type_mismatch: Field '{{field}}' expects a value of type '{{expectedType}}'
validation_messages.mismatch: {{field}} can not contain spaces or special characters like {{characters}}
validation_messages.password: Password must be minimum 8 characters long, contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character
validation_messages.array_each: {{field}} must not be empty or whitespace only
validation_messages.phone_code: {{field}} must be in format +<country code>, e.g +994
validation_messages.full_phone: {{field}} must be in format +<country code><number>, e.g +994123456789
validation_messages.phone: {{field}} must be a valid phone number
validation_messages.jwt: {{field}} must be a valid JWT token
validation_messages.hex_color: {{field}} must be a valid hex color
validation_messages.ip: {{field}} must be a valid IP address
validation_messages.mac_address: {{field}} must be a valid MAC address

exception_messages.internal_server_error_message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later
exception_messages.bad_request_message: The request could not be understood or was missing required parameters
exception_messages.unauthorized_message: Authentication failed or user does not have permissions for the requested operation
exception_messages.forbidden_message: Authentication succeeded but authenticated user does not have access to the requested resource
exception_messages.not_found_message: The requested resource could not be found
exception_messages.conflict_message: The request could not be completed due to a conflict with the current state of the resource
exception_messages.unprocessable_entity_message: The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors
exception_messages.gone_message: The requested resource is no longer available at the server and no forwarding address is known
exception_messages.too_many_requests_message: The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time ("rate limiting")
exception_messages.banned_message: Your account has been banned to until {{bannedToDate}}
exception_messages.same_data: {{field}} can not be same as old
exception_messages.enum_invalid: {{field}} must be of the following values: {{validValues}}

signup_verify.subject: Verify your account
signup_verify.thank_you: Thank you for registering with us! To complete your registration process, please use the following confirmation code:
signup_verify.instruction: Please enter this code on the confirmation page to verify your email address and finish signing up
signup_verify.ignore: If you didn't request this code, you can ignore this email
signup_verify.support: If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our support team at

forgot_password.subject: Password Reset Request
forgot_password.intro: We received a request to reset your password. If you made this request, please click the button below to reset your password:
forgot_password.fallback: If the button above does not work, please copy and paste the following URL into your browser:
forgot_password.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour. If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email
forgot_password.support: If you have any questions or need help, feel free to contact our support team at

email_not_found.subject: Email Not Found
email_not_found.intro: We could not find an account associated with the email address:
email_not_found.instruction: If you believe this is a mistake, please ensure you have entered the correct email address. Alternatively, you can register for a new account:
email_not_found.support: If you have any questions or need help, feel free to contact our support team at

google_sign_in.mail_subject: Password Reset - Google Sign In Detected
google_sign_in.subject: Google Sign-In Detected
google_sign_in.intro: The email address is associated with a Google Sign-In account
google_sign_in.instruction: If you want to access your account, please use the "Sign in with Google" option on the login page
google_sign_in.ignore: If you did not try to reset your password and believe this is a mistake, you can ignore this email
google_sign_in.support: If you have any questions or need help, feel free to contact our support team at

delete_account.subject: Delete Account Request
delete_account.intro: We received a request to delete your account. If you initiated this request, please click the button below to confirm the deletion of your account
delete_account.fallback: If the button above does not work, please copy and paste the following URL into your browser:
delete_account.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour. If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email
delete_account.support: If you have any questions or need help, feel free to contact our support team at

delete_account_completed.subject: Your Account Has Been Deleted
delete_account_completed.intro: We confirm that your Connectfy account has been successfully deleted
delete_account_completed.optional_restore: If this action was intentional, no further action is needed. However, if you change your mind, you can restore your account within the next 30 days by clicking the button below:
delete_account_completed.fallback: If the button above does not work, you can use this link:
delete_account_completed.note: Note: After 30 days, your account and all associated data will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered
delete_account_completed.support: If you did not request this deletion or need assistance, please contact our support team at

verify_yourself.subject: Confirm Your Registration
verify_yourself.instruction: Please enter this code on the confirmation modal to verify yourself
verify_yourself.support: If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our support team at

change_email.intro: We received a request to change your email address. If you didn't request this change, please ignore this email
change_email.subject: Confirm Your Email Change
change_email.support: If you need assistance, feel free to contact us at
change_email.fallback: If the button above doesn't work, click the link below:
change_email.thank_you: Thank you for being part of our community!
change_email.instruction: Click the button below to confirm your new email address
change_email.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour

error_messages.password_rule: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, one special character, and be 8–30 characters long
error_messages.process_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again later
error_messages.invalid_email_format: Please enter a valid email address
error_messages.email_too_long: Email must be at most 254 characters
error_messages.email_local_part_too_long: The part before @ must be at most 64 characters
error_messages.email_consecutive_dots: Email must not contain consecutive dots

user_messages.forgot_password_successful: Password reset request has been sent
user_messages.password_generated_message: Your new password has been created and copied to your clipboard. We haven’t saved it anywhere, so make sure to store it safely — for example, in a password manager or a secure note
user_messages.reset_password_successfull: Your password has been successfully reset
user_messages.check_inbox_for_confirmation: A confirmation message has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and spam folder
user_messages.check_inbox: A confirmation message has been sent. Please check your inbox and spam folder
user_messages.google_login_error: Users logged in with Google cannot change password, or email
user_messages.account_deleted: Your account has been scheduled for deletion. You can restore it within 30 days by logging back in. After 30 days your data will be permanently removed. If you need help, contact support at conenctfy.team@gmail.com
user_messages.logout_successfull: You have been logged out successfully
user_messages.restore_account_successful: Your account has been successfully restored
user_messages.account_deactivated: Your account has been successfully deactivated
user_messages.otp_resent: Verification code has been resent to your email

common.verify_account_heading: Almost there — enter the verification code
common.verify_account_message_part_1: We sent a 6-digit verification code (OTP) to your email address:
common.google_signup_description: Sign up quickly using your Google account
common.face_id_subtitle: Please wait while the camera scans and verifies your face, then click the {{field}} button
common.forgot_password_subtitle: Select an identifier to find your account. We'll send a secure password-reset link to the account's registered email address
common.settings_description: Manage your account, configure privacy, and customize the platform to your needs
common.choose_light_dark_system: Choose light, dark or system theme
common.select_app_language: Select the language used in the app
common.which_page_on_start: Which page should be shown on app start
common.reset_all_general_settings: Reset all general settings to defaults
common.manage_account_info: Manage your account information and enhance security
common.manage_two_factor_auth: Protect your account with two-factor authentication
common.enable_two_factor_authentication_descrip: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling two-factor authentication.
common.disable_two_factor_authentication_descri: You are about to disable two-factor authentication. Your account will be less secure.
common.update_phone: Add or update your phone number
common.account_creation_login: Account creation and last login information
common.privacy_subheader: Manage the visibility and security of your information
common.friend_requests_desc: People who can send you friend requests
common.message_privacy_desc: People allowed to send you messages
common.email_visibility: Who can see my email address
common.social_visibility: Who can see my social media links
common.last_seen_visibility: Who can see my last seen
common.birthday_date_visibility: Who can see my birthday date
common.notification_subheader: Manage your notification preferences and sounds
common.friendship_notification_sound_desc: Sound for friend requests and acceptances
common.sent_sound_desc: Play a sound when you send a message
common.receive_sound_desc: Play a sound when you receive a new message
common.show_header_and_content_desc: Notification header and its content will be shown
common.show_header_only_desc: Only the notification header will be shown and the content will not be displayed
common.hide_notifications_desc: Notifications will not be shown at all
common.unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
common.update_email_description: We'll send a confirmation link to the new address
common.change_password_description: Set a new password for your account
common.update_username_description: Your new username will be shown on your profile
common.read_receipts_desc: If you turn off read receipts, you won’t receive notifications when someone reads your messages, and they won’t see when you read theirs
common.verify_identity_to_continue: You need to verify your identity to continue
common.update_phone_number_description: Update your phone number to stay connected with us
common.manage_phone_number_description: You can update or remove your phone number here
common.reset_settings_title: Are you sure you want to reset the settings?
common.reset_settings_subtitle: Resetting the settings will clear the following:
common.delete_account_description: Deleting your account will permanently remove access to your profile and content. Some data may remain in backups for a short period. You can restore your account within 30 days
common.delete_account_reason_label: Why are you deleting your account?
common.logout_desc: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to sign in again to access your account
common.restoring_account: Restoring your account. This may take a moment. Please do not close this tab
common.deactivate_account_desc: Your account will be temporarily deactivated. Your data will not be deleted. Once you log in again, your account will be automatically reactivate
common.privacy_subtitle: Choose who can see your profile
common.privacy_everyone_description: Your profile is visible to everyone. All users can view your information.
common.privacy_friends_description: Only your friends can see your profile. Other users will see limited information.
common.privacy_nobody_description: Your profile is completely private. Only you can view your information.
common.please_enter_your_details_to_sign_in_to_: Please enter your details to sign in to your account
common.join_connectfy_description: Join Connectfy community and connect with people from all over the world
common.auth_sidebar_description: The minimalist workspace designed for modern communities and high-impact teams.
common.checking_email: Checking if the email address exists…

terms.section_1_p1: Welcome to Connectify. By accessing and using our chat application, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use our service
terms.section_2_p1: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum legal age in your jurisdiction) to use our chat application. By registering an account, you agree to provide accurate and complete information
terms.section_2_p2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, and for restricting access to your device
terms.section_3_p1: Our chat application is designed to facilitate communication and social interactions. You agree to use the service in a manner that is lawful, ethical, and respectful to other users
terms.section_3_p2: You must not engage in any activities that could harm the functionality of the application or the experience of other users
terms.section_4_p1: All content, including text, images, logos, and software, is the property of Connectify or its licensors and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws
terms.section_4_p2: You agree not to reproduce, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from any content on our platform without our prior written consent
terms.section_5_p1: While using our chat application, you agree not to:
terms.section_5_list_1: Post or transmit any content that is defamatory, harassing, or otherwise unlawful
terms.section_5_list_2: Engage in spamming, phishing, or other fraudulent activities
terms.section_5_list_3: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or interfere with the proper functioning of the service
terms.section_5_p2: Violation of these terms may result in the suspension or termination of your account
terms.section_6_p1: Your privacy is important to us. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for information on how we collect, use, and disclose personal data
terms.section_7_p1: Our chat application is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error‑free
terms.section_7_p2: In no event shall Connectify be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of your use or inability to use the service
terms.section_8_p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the chat application at any time and without notice if you breach these Terms and Conditions or if we deem it necessary for the protection of our users and service
terms.section_9_p1: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Connectify, its affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, or losses arising out of your use of the service or your violation of these Terms and Conditions
terms.section_10_p1: We reserve the right to modify or update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Your continued use of the service after any modifications indicates your acceptance of the new terms
terms.section_11_p1: If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:
terms.footer_text: By using our chat application, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions
